objects.label: chair
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown glossy wooden chair with a black upholstered seat cushion and carved curved legs and back; the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and is partially occluded by a tabletop, with reflective varnished surfaces visible.
